
The tool I use https://www.npmjs.com/package/@smartpy/timelock , https://github.com/RomarQ/tezos-timelock/ the tool works good on other functions such as openChest and createChestKey. I used node 14.14.0, 16.9.0, 16.10.10 all same output The error I got when I try to use the chest and key: [ 0, [ 248, ix { t: 0, c: 'Failure', l: 7 }, -3 ], ix { t: 0, c: 'rsa modulus is too small', l: 24 } ] example chest and key outputs, { chest: '', key: '' } working chest and key example (obtained from example in github), const chest = ""; const chest_key = ""; noticable difference is hex generated by tezos-timelock is smaller than functional ones. how can I generate functional chest and key using js ?
